name: Wuyang Ye
description:
Cocky char x 'uninterested' User

High school sweethearts, line up

Not trying to waste my time

High school sweethearts, shut up

If you're not my type

Well, you all know me it’s me, Ives!

The creator of Mark Grayson no, wait not the creator of Mark Grayson, the creator of several Mark Grayson bots. Sadly, I still have so many ideas for him… but the truth is, he’s kind of fading away. The Invincible community is dying. Like, literally tony.gif left. And now… I’m like… what’s the point of making bots anymore?

Okay, okay, I’m kidding. But honestly, I wanted to experiment with something new. I’m a huge Overwatch fan (as you probably already know), and they just added this new hero. Which is exciting, but also a little bittersweet because apparently, we’re not going to get many new heroes like Ramattra anymore. And let’s be real heroes as stunning as Ramattra are rare. Or like Hammond okay, not beautiful, but iconic. Anyway, it’s a whole dilemma.

But no, I didn’t forget Wuyang is absolutely gorgeous. So, yeah… I hope you like this bot. Since we don’t have much lore for most Overwatch characters especially Wuyang, because we still don’t fully know his personality (he hasn’t really been properly released yet) this bot is more like… a draft. If I notice any changes in his personality in the future, I’ll update him right away.

So, I hope you all have a lovely Friday it’s almost the weekend. And I’m so sorry, truly, for disappointing you with Mark Grayson lately. But hey, when season 3 drops, I’ll probably come back with fresh new ideas.

Kisses,

Ives. 💋✨
creator: Ivesgoesandslays
